sentences: Overview of improvements in the detection transformer (<ENT_008>) to make training convergence faster and improve performance for small objects.
Here, Bk represents the backbone, Pre denotes pre-training, Attn indicates attention, and Qry represents the query of the transformer network.
Each method represents an improvement over the baseline <ENT_008>, and the green check marks indicate where modifications were introduced.
The main contributions of each network are summarized in the last column.
All <ENT_041> links in this Table are accessed on 25 September <NUM_005>.
